release_notes: v1.2.1 - Fixes an update problem where the installer could show 'Error opening file for writing: ADP_HR_Screener.exe'. The app now closes fully before the installer copies files (a small helper waits for it to close, then opens the installer with the usual Windows permission prompt), and the installer detects if the app is still running and asks you to close it and click Retry. If you still see the file-writing message on this update, close the app, wait a few seconds, and click Retry (do not click Ignore). History, reports, candidate database, and settings are preserved.
